name: Crockpot Corn Stuffed Pork Chops
recipeIngredient: 1 cup Whole kernel corn, drained (7 oz)
recipeInstructions:
1. Have the butcher cut a pocket or, with a sharp knife, make a horizontal slit in the side of each chop to form a pocket for stuffing.
2. Mix the undrained corn, bread crumbs, onion, pepper, salt, and sage together.
3. Spoon the corn mixture into the slits.
4. Close the pockets securely with toothpicks or small skewers.
5. Place the pork chops on a metal rack or trivet in the crock-pot.
6. Cover and cook on low for 6 to 8 hours.
7. Serve with fruit salad and lemon-buttered broccoli. Makes 5 to 6 servings.
